news.headline: Skycharger appoints John Friedrich as new Chief Development Officer to accelerate clean energy initiatives in EV charging.
news.summary: In Sacramento, California on March 7, 2025, Skycharger, a prominent electric vehicle (EV) charging solutions company, has named John Friedrich as its new Chief Development Officer. Friedrich brings valuable experience in transportation electrification to the role, further boosting Skycharger's growth in the industry.

news.headline: RMHCDC in Washington, DC appoints Sam Kussin-Shoptaw as inaugural Corporate Council Chair, enhancing business ties.
news.summary: A recent announcement made in Washington on March 7, 2025, revealed that Ronald McDonald House Charities of Greater Washington, DC (RMHCDC) has appointed Sam Kussin-Shoptaw as the first Chair of its Corporate Council. In this newly established position, Sam will play a pivotal role in enhancing RMHCDC's connections with the corporate sector, aiming to solidify partnerships and foster collaborations. This strategic move is part of RMHCDC's efforts to expand its reach and impact within the community, leveraging Sam's expertise in business engagement to drive meaningful change.

news.headline: Tweetsie Railroad reopens on April 5, 2025 in Blowing Rock, NC. Save $10 on season pass before March 31.
news.summary: Don't miss out on savings for a season pass at Tweetsie Railroad in Blowing Rock, N.C., before March 31, 2025. The park is set to open on April 5 for another season of Wild West Family Fun. Families can enjoy a discount of $10 on their visit by purchasing a season pass before the deadline.

news.headline: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: The US is interested in macro and broad-based trade deal with India.
US jobless rate climbs to 4.1%, missing job growth forecast.
Founder and CEO Jerry Schiano transitions to Executive Vice Chairman at Spring EQ as Joe Steffa becomes CEO for growth.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, a prominent home equity financing company called Spring EQ revealed that its Founder and CEO, Jerry Schiano, will now serve as the Executive Vice Chairman. Taking over as the new CEO is Joe Steffa, who currently holds the position of Spring EQ's Executive Chairman. This change in leadership aims to steer the company towards further growth and development. Spring EQ is known for its commitment to revolutionizing the home equity financing system by offering straightforward and personalized solutions to homeowners across America.

news.headline: US rate futures traders now betting Fed to wait until June before restarting rate cuts.
Global microirrigation systems market to reach USD 17.8 billion by 2028, up from USD 11.3 billion in 2023, with North America leading growth due to water resource efficiency and sustainability.
news.summary: The global microirrigation systems market is projected to grow significantly, reaching USD 17.8 billion by 2028 from USD 11.3 billion in 2023, with a 9.4% CAGR. This growth is fueled by efficient water usage in drought conditions, higher yields, and cost-effectiveness. Emerging economies with agriculture as a primary occupation will play a key role. Companies marketing sustainably produced goods are driving market share for microirrigation systems by reducing water consumption and environmental impact. In North America, particularly the US, concerns over water allocation are driving adoption of microirrigation, making the region a key growth area. Notable market players include Lindsay Corporation, Nelson Irrigation, Rain Bird Corporation, and T-L Irrigation. Public and private sector support globally is further propelling market expansion.

news.headline: Analysts predict Bitcoin's limited growth post-reserve plan snub, with BTC struggling to surpass resistance levels.
news.summary: Bitcoin experts are cautioning about a restricted upward potential following President Trump's economic stimulus package that omits new government investments. This exclusion has led to Bitcoin facing difficulties in maintaining levels above crucial resistance points.

news.headline: It's a 10® Haircare, Be A 10™ Cosmetics & Ex10sions by Carolyn offer 50% off on International Women's Day.
news.summary: Annual sale held by female-founded brands to show appreciation for their loyal female customer base in Miami. Carolyn Aronson, founder, CEO, and owner of It's a 10® Haircare, Be A 10 Cosmetics™, and Ex10sions by Carolyn, annually hosts this event. The sale includes discounts on a range of products to thank consumers for their patronage.

news.headline: Dario partners with Rula to offer 15,000 providers, boosting B2B2C sales growth in behavioral health.
news.summary: DarioHealth Corp. (Nasdaq: DRIO) has unveiled a strategic partnership that is set to bolster its B2B2C sales performance, augmenting its reach to more than 15,000 providers across the country. This move is projected to significantly impact the company's sales growth. The announcement was made in New York on March 7, 2025. Dario, a prominent player in the digital health sector worldwide, looks to capitalize on this arrangement to enhance its market presence and leverage the extensive network of providers now accessible through the partnership.

news.headline: Feetures partners with Girls on the Run for International Women's Day. Limited-edition sock sales support program in Charlotte. 🏃‍♀️ #EmpowerGirls #NumOfCharity
news.summary: Funds raised from the sale of a special collaboration sock will benefit Girls on the Run in Charlotte, North Carolina. The limited-edition sock, created by Feetures, the top running sock brand in America, is aimed at supporting athletes across all age groups and encouraging a healthy lifestyle from a young age. The initiative is part of a broader effort to promote physical activity and wellness.

news.headline: Welltower unveiled a new visual identity showcasing a decade-long transformation, symbolizing bold innovation.
news.summary: Toledo, Ohio - On March 7, 2025, Welltower Inc. (NYSE: WELL) unveiled a new brand imagery and website to showcase its visionary changes over the past ten years. The company, a member of the S&P 500, has positioned itself as a global leader in its industry. Welltower Inc. has embraced an innovative approach, reflecting an outsider mindset that has driven its impressive transformation.

news.headline: Consumer housing sentiment declines, Fannie Mae HPSI drops 1.8 points to 71.6 in Feb 2025, first decrease since 2023.
news.summary: There has been a notable rise in pessimism regarding mortgage rates and personal financial situations. The Fannie Mae Home Purchase Sentiment Index® (HPSI) recorded a 1.8-point drop in February 2025, now standing at 71.6. This decline can be attributed mainly to the growing negativity among consumers concerning mortgage-related matters.

news.headline: Tanishq opens 6th U.S. store in Cumming, GA, marking milestone in North American expansion. Successful event held on Feb 26.
news.summary: Atlanta - Tanishq, recognized as India's top jewelry brand, has recently unveiled its sixth store in the United States, situated in Cumming, Georgia. This development highlights a major achievement in the brand's growth in North America. A grand in-store event took place on February 26 to celebrate the opening, and Tanishq's expansion journey is on track.

news.headline: US short-term interest rate futures drop after jobs report. Traders back away from bets on May Fed rate cut.
EBGLYSS maintenance injection led to complete skin clearance in 50% patients with atopic dermatitis after 3 years.
news.summary: In the monotherapy trials of EBGLYSS Week 16 responders, 50% reached complete skin clearance (EASI 100 or IGA 0) and 87% achieved nearly clear skin (EASI 90) after three years following a monthly maintenance injection. Additional research showed a significant impact of EBGLYSS in various studies.

news.headline: MCA receives 2025 NASPO Exchange Community Impact Award for exceptional community service commitment.
news.summary: In Spartanburg, South Carolina, on March 7, 2025, Mobile Communications America (MCA) received the 2025 NASPO Exchange Community Impact Award for its dedication to community service and social responsibility. This accolade highlights MCA's commitment to making a positive impact on society.

news.headline: Comcast will participate in New Street Research Investor Conference with EVP Elad Nafshi on March 26, 2025; webcast at 4:45 PM ET.
news.summary: Philadelphia-based Comcast Corporation (Nasdaq: CMCSA) disclosed that Elad Nafshi, the Executive Vice President and Chief Network Officer of Comcast Cable, is set to take part in the New Street Research and BCG Future of Connectivity Leaders Conference on Wednesday, March 26, 2025. The event will be broadcasted live on the Company's Investor Relations webpage at www.cmcsa.com on the same day at 4:45 P.M. Eastern Time. Following that, an on-demand replay will be accessible shortly after the conclusion of the event.

news.headline: Better Home & Finance Holding Co. (NASDAQ: BETR; BETRW) to announce 2024 Q4 and full year results on March 18, 2025. Conference call on March 19, 2025 at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: A financial services company, Better Home & Finance Holding Company (NASDAQ: BETR; BETRW), plans to reveal its 2024 fourth quarter and full year financial outcomes on March 18, 2025, after markets shut. The subsequent day, a conference call and webcast are scheduled for Wednesday, March 19, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss the financial results. Interested parties can register for the live webcast and access the call by phone using details provided on the Company's investor page.

news.headline: New apartments filling up at nearly slowest rate on record - 47% rented in Q3 2024. Builders may pull back. (char. count: 93)
news.summary: In Seattle, a recent report from Redfin revealed that only 47% of newly constructed apartments completed in the third quarter of 2024 were leased within three months. This figure matches the lowest rate since the beginning of the pandemic, tying with the fourth quarter of 2023. The analysis was based on data from the U.S. Census Bureau's absorption rate for unfurnished apartments. Redfin, a technology-driven real estate brokerage listed on NASDAQ as RDFN, highlighted this trend in the housing market.

news.headline: Presto expands partnership with Galardi Group for Voice AI at Wienerschnitzel drive-thrus, now in 35 locations.
news.summary: Presto Phoenix, Inc., based in San Mateo, California, a prominent provider of AI-powered solutions for quick-service restaurants (QSRs), has revealed an extended collaboration with Galardi Group, the umbrella organization of Wienerschnitzel. The partnership aims to introduce advanced Voice AI ordering technology in the drive-thru locations of the QSR chain. Currently, 35 sites under the Galardi Group have implemented Presto's Voice AI ordering system. This integration showcases the growing trend of AI technology in enhancing operational efficiency within the QSR industry.

news.headline: NANO Nuclear Energy names Florent Heidet, Ph.D. as CTO & Head of Reactor Dev. Previously at Ultra Safe Nuclear Corp., he brings expertise in advanced nuclear tech & reactor building.
news.summary: A highly experienced individual, who previously served as the Head of Engineering at Ultra Safe Nuclear Corp., is now leveraging their firsthand knowledge of advanced reactor technologies and substantial experience in building reactors. This individual's expertise is expected to greatly contribute to the incorporation of new technologies and the advancement of reactor construction processes.

news.headline: Inspired partners with Altenar to offer Virtual Sports content via their sportsbook platform, enhancing user experience.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Inspired Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ: INSE), a prominent B2B supplier of gaming services, revealed a strategic alliance with Altenar, a top sports betting software company catering to licensed operators. This partnership will see Inspired’s Virtual Sports offerings incorporated into Altenar’s sportsbook platform, granting access to a wide array of Inspired Virtual Sports content to Altenar’s clientele for the first time.

news.headline: Oruka Therapeutics presents ORKA-002 data at AAD Annual Meeting: NHP half-life surpasses 30 days, 3x longer than bimekizumab. Dose interval 2-3x/year.
news.summary: Non-human primates (NHP) have a half-life lasting over 30 days, which is more than three times longer than bimekizumab. This extended half-life suggests a dosing interval of approximately two to three times per year.

news.headline: Lexicon Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: LXRX) to present at Leerink Partners Global Healthcare Conference 2025 in Miami on March 12 at 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Lexicon Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: LXRX) revealed their participation in a fireside chat at the Leerink Partners Global Healthcare Conference 2025 in Miami. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, March 12, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: Dean General appointed as new COO of Advantage Solutions' Branded Services segment.
news.summary: Dean General has been appointed as the new Chief Operating Officer of the Branded Services business segment at Advantage Solutions. General will oversee the operational activities of the segment, which includes a portfolio of [provide approximate number] client brands. Prior to this role, General served as [previous job title] at [formerly held company], where he [mention key achievements or responsibilities]. The appointment of General is part of Advantage Solutions' strategy to strengthen its leadership team and drive growth within the Branded Services business segment.

news.headline: Achieve Life Sciences (Nasdaq: ACHV) to present at Barclays 27th Annual Healthcare Conference, Miami, March 11-13, 2025.
news.summary: Seattle and Vancouver-based Achieve Life Sciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: ACHV) will be participating in the upcoming Barclays 27th Annual Global Healthcare Conference taking place from March 11 to 13, 2025 in Miami, FL. Specializing in the advancement and market distribution of cytisinicline to combat nicotine addiction for smoking cessation, Achieve Life Sciences, Inc. aims to present its findings and strategies at the event. The company's involvement signifies its commitment to addressing global health issues, with a focus on aiding individuals in overcoming nicotine dependence.

news.headline: Netcapital will host Algernon NeuroScience's Reg A offering, providing broker-dealer services for the $NCPL, $NCPLW subsidiary.
news.summary: In Boston, MA, on March 07, 2025, Netcapital Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, Netcapital Securities Inc., a FINRA-registered broker-dealer, has been selected by Algernon NeuroScience Inc. for its upcoming Regulation A (Reg A) offering. Netcapital Securities, trading under NASDAQ as NCPL and NCPLW, is set to offer broker-dealer and administrative services for this engagement. This includes services like underwriting and placement agent services for the planned offering by Algernon NeuroScience.

news.headline: Hudson Global will release Q4 2024 financial results on March 14.
Venture Global's earnings report: Revenue at $1.52B, missed consensus. EBITDA at $688M, EPS $0.33. $18B LNG expansion in Louisiana.
news.summary: Shares of Venture Global, Inc. (NYSE:VG) are up in premarket trading on Friday following the release of their fourth-quarter results. The company, which started trading on the NYSE on January 24, 2025, reported a 7% decrease in revenue year over year to $1.52 billion, below the expected $1.92 billion. LNG volumes sold dropped by 13% compared to the previous year, with Cragos declining by 18% and TBtu by 16%. Adjusted EBITDA also fell by 15% year over year to $688 million due to lower LNG sales and increased costs for project remediation and commissioning. However, the earnings per share (EPS) of $0.33 surpassed the consensus of $0.30.

news.headline: Ferrellgas Partners, L.P. reported its Q2 FY2025 results with the quarter ending on January 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Liberty, Missouri, on March 07, 2025, Ferrellgas Partners, L.P. (OTC: FGPR), also known as Ferrellgas, disclosed their financial performance for the second quarter of the 2025 fiscal year which concluded on January 31, 2025.

Stocks fell, Trump criticized 'globalists'. Nvidia, Tesla, Palantir, Netflix dropped. Broadcom rose. Jobs report awaited.
news.summary: Stocks took a significant hit recently after President Trump criticized "globalists," causing the market to tumble. Key players such as Nvidia, Tesla, Palantir, and Netflix experienced substantial losses, while Broadcom saw a late surge. As investors eagerly await the upcoming jobs report, the impact of Trump's remarks on the market remains a focal point. The Dow Jones Futures forecast uncertainty amid these developments, with all eyes on how the market will respond in the coming days.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures up pre-jobs report and Powell speech; Nvidia partner Hewlett Packard Enterprise crashes post earning.
news.summary: On Friday, Dow Jones futures increased in anticipation of the upcoming jobs report and a speech by Fed Chair Powell. Hewlett Packard Enterprise, a partner of Nvidia, experienced a significant drop in earnings. The market is eagerly awaiting the latest updates, with key economic indicators and corporate performances under scrutiny. It is a pivotal moment for investors as they await crucial insights from these events.

news.headline: SEALSQ chip in Switzerland protects crypto wallets from quantum threats, ensuring long-term security. Visit link for more.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Geneva, Switzerland, a groundbreaking hardware solution was unveiled to safeguard digital assets in the post-quantum era. This innovative technology aims to provide long-term security for crypto wallets against emerging threats from quantum computing. For further details, interested parties can visit the following link: https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/protecting-crypto-wallets-from-quantum-computing-threats-carlos-km65e/.

news.headline: Kremlin: Putin and Serbia's Vucic discuss energy cooperation.
EU accelerates banking review due to increasing threat from Wall Street, aiming to address concerns promptly.
